Columns.Name: 特別改良判定保証単価フラグ

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT main.group_id AS "グループID",
    main.order_type_id AS "申込タイプID",
    main.product_id AS "商品ID",
    main.product_order_type AS "申込区分",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.original_product_name IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.original_product_name
            ELSE main.product_name
        END AS "商品名",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.original_billing_product_name IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.original_billing_product_name
            ELSE main.billing_product_name
        END AS "請求品名",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.original_special_note IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.original_special_note
            ELSE main.special_note
        END AS "商品注釈",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_price IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.special_price
            ELSE main.standard_price
        END AS "販売単価",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_price IS NOT NULL) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "特別販売単価フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_survey_price IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.special_survey_price
            ELSE main.survey_price
        END AS "調査単価",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_survey_price IS NOT NULL) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "特別調査単価フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_analysis_price IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.special_analysis_price
            ELSE main.analysis_price
        END AS "解析単価",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_analysis_price IS NOT NULL) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "特別解析単価フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_gurantee_price IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.special_gurantee_price
            ELSE main.gurantee_price
        END AS "保証単価",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_gurantee_price IS NOT NULL) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "特別保証単価フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_impjudge_gurantee_price IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.special_impjudge_gurantee_price
            ELSE main.impjudge_gurantee_price
        END AS "改良判定保証単価",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_impjudge_gurantee_price IS NOT NULL) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "特別改良判定保証単価フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_base_price IS NOT NULL) THEN subc.special_base_price
            ELSE main.base_price
        END AS "基礎単価",
        CASE
            WHEN (subc.special_base_price IS NOT NULL) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS "特別基礎単価フラグ",
    main.standard_price AS "標準単価",
    main.survey_price AS "標準調査単価",
    main.gurantee_price AS "標準保証単価",
    main.base_price AS "標準基礎単価",
    main.sort_no AS "並び順",
        CASE
            WHEN (subd.product_public_flg IS NOT NULL) THEN subd.product_public_flg
            ELSE main.product_public_flg
        END AS "商品公開フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (main.active_flg = 0) THEN 0
            WHEN (subc.active_flg = 0) THEN 0
            ELSE 1
        END AS "有効フラグ"
   FROM ((( SELECT main_1.group_id,
            main_1.order_type_id,
            suba.product_id,
            suba.product_order_type,
            suba.product_public_flg,
            suba.sort_no,
                CASE
                    WHEN (subb.order_product_name IS NOT NULL) THEN subb.order_product_name
                    ELSE subb.product_name
                END AS product_name,
                CASE
                    WHEN (subb.billing_product_name IS NOT NULL) THEN subb.billing_product_name
                    ELSE subb.product_name
                END AS billing_product_name,
            subb.special_note,
            subb.standard_price,
            subb.survey_price,
            subb.analysis_price,
            subb.gurantee_price,
            subb.impjudge_gurantee_price,
            subb.active_flg,
            subb.quantity_need_flg,
            subb.quantity_minimum,
            subb.quantity_calc,
            subb.base_price,
            subb.quantity_unit,
            subb.product_type_id,
            subb.default_quantity,
            subb.over_or_surpass,
            subb.survey_product_id,
            subb.warranty_product_id,
            subb.analysis_product_id,
            subb.survey_method_id,
            subb.direct_foundation_warranty_flg
           FROM ((m_group_order_type main_1
             JOIN m_product_order_type suba ON ((main_1.order_type_id = suba.order_type_id)))
             JOIN m_product subb ON ((suba.product_id = subb.product_id)))) main
     LEFT JOIN m_group_product subc ON (((main.group_id = subc.group_id) AND (main.order_type_id = subc.order_type_id) AND (main.product_id = subc.product_id))))
     LEFT JOIN m_group_product_public subd ON (((main.group_id = subd.group_id) AND (main.order_type_id = subd.order_type_id) AND (main.product_id = subd.product_id))))
  ORDER BY main.group_id, main.order_type_id, main.product_id;
